programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt asks for Jake's help in a case that is exceptionally meaningful to him. Charles and Terry work together on a side business.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends compete in a scavenger hunt designed by Raj to test their scientific knowledge and life skills, but the game brings out the best and worst in everyone. As the hunt progresses, Howard and Amy begin to bond over their shared musical tastes, while Penny and Sheldon work together as a team and Bernadette becomes fiercely competitive.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon introduces Amy to Raiders of the Lost Ark - one of his favourite films - and is distraught when she ends up pointing out a plot hole that ruins the whole story. Meanwhile, Leonard realises he can manipulate Penny into feeling sorry for him when his mother publishes a reveal-all book about his childhood problems. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina mixes old-fashioned witchcraft with modern technology in a bid to help Zelda mend a broken heart, but the spell backfires disastrously, altering the Spellman family's entire history.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina's ex-boyfriend Derek comes for a visit with bad consequences. Zelda joins in when Hilda hosts a charity auction.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey begin the egg implantation process with their surrogate Brenda - but Audrey soon becomes frustrated at Jeff's attitude. Elsewhere, Adam steals Jeff's steak delivery, while Russell and Timmy date professional basketball players and ponder the benefits of flings with no strings attached.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff's plans for his wedding anniversary backfire when he tries to prove Audrey has forgotten about the all-important day. Elsewhere, Timmy is paid by Russell to act as his translator on a date with an Italian girl, but soon tires of his assignment.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina is annoyed when Josh says that women cannot play tennis as well as men, so she acquires some professional - and magical - help. Zelda and Hilda coach Amanda for her witch's licence.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Always willing to help friends, family and colleagues advice with their problems, whether they ask for it or not, Sabrina finds herself in a heap of trouble when her advice goes awry. Roxie is infatuated with a mystery man.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Meld and Joe write thank you cards to everyone who sent them wedding gifts, and pretend to be delighted with a huge, ugly coffee maker given to them by Aunt Bunny and Uncle Bert. Meld makes Joe return the machine to the shop, but then Bunny and Bert pay an unexpected visit to the newlyweds. Lennox is upset when Marco gets an offer he cannot refuse. Valerie Harper (Rhoda) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel discovers that Joe used to be a member of a boy band in his youth, but when she buys Dani a piano to foster her dreams of a musical career, she is surprised to find that Joe is completely opposed to the idea of his daughter attempting to become a musician. Zander tries to keep it a secret from his girlfriend Lilah that he and Lennox are working together.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie realises how much she misses her ex-boyfriend Brad, so enlists Tucker's help to arrange a reunion. However when the former flame announces he still has feelings for her, Ben's misguided advice leads to him making a rash decision. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, Tahj Mowry and Melissa Peterman.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie feels unappreciated for all the work she does for the boys and Emma, and decides to go on strike. However, Ben soon realises how much he needs his mother's help, and comes up with a way to get back into her good books.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon re-evaluates the time he spends with Amy when she takes a job at the university. Meanwhile, Howard is forced to sleep on his friend's sofa after he gets into an argument with Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Mayim Bialik.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Recipe for Death II: Kiss the Cook
programme.desc: Adam asks his father for money to film his own action movie. Erica and Beverly go clothes shopping, and Erica uses Beverly's sweaters to create her own version of a popular outfit. Comedy, starring Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam gets between Murray and Marvin when they go without him to the Philadelphia Thanksgiving Day parade to see KITT from TV show Knight Rider. Beverly invites Lainey and Bill to Thanksgiving dinner so that Barry won't split his time between two households, but her plans soon go awry. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon competes with Wil Wheaton (guest starring as himself) for the role of the new Professor Proton when the scientist's old TV series gets a reboot. Penny looks after Halley when Howard and Bernadette are both put on bed rest.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Bert collaborate on a research project, even though Sheldon is embarrassed to be associated with the study of geology. Penny and Bernadette coach Raj on how to navigate his fledgling relationship with Ruchi. Swati Kapila and Brian Posehn guest star.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe puts all his thought into a birthday gift for Mel - so when she ends up not liking it, she does her best to please him by pretending she is happy with it. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel organises a family game night, pitting herself and Joe against Lennox and Zander, but the competition leads to a trip down memory lane when they reminisce about the past. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Ben grows grumpier about all the fuss surrounding the yuletide season, so he makes a wish that the holiday had never existed. However, when his wish is granted, he's completely unprepared for the consequences: Emma's existence is erased and everyone's lives are set on totally different courses.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.sub-title: She Loves Me, She Loves Me Note
programme.desc: Ben starts to suspect that Riley might secretly be in love with Danny and comes up with a plan to find out the truth, while Bonnie takes extreme measures when she experiences financial problems. Comedy following the exploits of a man raising his infant daughter with help from his friends and family. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Though still heartbroken over Sophia, Jake's spirits are lifted when the squad is invited to a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training simulation. Gina performs a psychological test on Holt, while Santiago and Diaz compete for a day off.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired by the Karate Kid films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg decide to face off in a karate match to settle their long-running feud once and for all. Later, Barry and Adam ask Uncle Marvin for some martial arts training - but the only thing they learn is how to do his cleaning.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Barry starts checking out the best medical schools, Lainey reveals she has won a scholarship to art college. Erica and Adam start to suspect that Murray loves the family dog Lucky more than them.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette's friends each try different tactics to help her go into labour. Howard isn't happy when he finds out that Bernadette has already chosen their son's name ithout his input.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While Leonard jumps through hoops to help secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy, Howard and Bernadette have a difficult time deciding which one of them should stay at home with the kids and who should return to work.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at a classic villain from the soap. Silas is arrested as the village grieves for Heidi. The McQueens receive some devastating news - where is Mercedes?(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cops of the 99th Precinct become the latest victim of the Vulture, a detective from Major Crimes with a habit of taking over investigations just as they are about to be solved. However, Jake is determined not to let the hotshot steal his thunder and races to close his case first. Meanwhile, Holt and Gina help Terry regain his right to carry a gun.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to get Sheldon into the Christmas mood by playing a game, but things do not go as planned when Sheldon reveals a childhood trauma. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Naked Attraction

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff grows jealous of Audrey's sexy home Pilates instructor and decides to fire him. Timmy and Russell fight for the attention of a good-looking waitress, and Jennifer is embarrassed when she learns about Adam's cheerleading past.(n)

programme.desc: Audrey tries to forge a deeper connection with Brenda, who agreed to be her surrogate, by arranging for her and Jeff to go on a double date with the woman and her girlfriend Becky. programme.title: The House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A stray cat wanders into a magician's mansion, and finds it is full of strange gadgets. The illusionist allows him to stay, to the annoyance of his other pets, but the cat proves an invaluable addition to the group when their owner's scheming nephew plots to take the house for himself. Animated adventure, with the voices of Murray Blue and Doug Stone.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Yorkshire groom Lee is tasked with planning a surprise wedding for bride-to-be Rebecca, but instead, goes on a week-long trip around Europe with his brother Lee and his friends.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan loves music as well as his home town of Stoke-on-Trent. So, when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to plan their wedding, he decides to honour them - and not her - with nuptials based on the rare grooves of Northern Soul. Will this groom be able to deliver a swinging day, or will his bride be swinging wildly at him?(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is assigned to a minor graffiti case by Captain Holt as punishment for turning up late for work, but the investigation becomes a major headache when the vandal's identity is revealed. Meanwhile, Gina's psychic friend Carlene visits the precinct to help with a case, and upsets Charles with a prediction about his romantic life. American comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For the first time in his career, Jake has a growing number of cases he just can't seem to solve, and the other detectives worry his run of bad luck will rub off on them. Holt asks Amy to take charge of a community outreach programme for at-risk youths, and Boyle helps Jeffords with a tough personal assignment. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake meets an attractive medical examiner at a crime scene, but annoys his colleagues when his attempts to get together with her cause a hold-up with an autopsy report. Meanwhile, Amy discovers Jeffords has some hidden talents when the police sketch artist goes off sick.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cops of the 99th Precinct become the latest victim of the Vulture, a detective from Major Crimes with a habit of taking over investigations just as they are about to be solved. However, Jake is determined not to let the hotshot steal his thunder and races to close his case first. Meanwhile, Holt and Gina help Terry regain his right to carry a gun.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Financial Secret and Fish Sauce
programme.desc: When Sheldon's father asks him to keep a secret from Mary, the stress of not being honest drives him to Tam's for his first sleepover. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Research Study and Czechoslovakian Wedding Pastries
programme.desc: Dr Sturgis recommends Sheldon and Missy for a university research study on twins. but Mary is unhappy when the test results go to Sheldon's head. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazine's '30 to Watch Under 30', Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friend's new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is flattered when a graduate student takes a shine to him, but she thinks his social life is distracting him from his work and removes him from his limited circle of friends by forcing him to work on a troublesome scientific problem. Guest starring Riki Lindhome.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's TV breaks down, so she heads to the boys' flat to watch her favourite shows. However, Sheldon tires of her presence and bans future visits, leading to an embarrassing form of retaliation. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj search for the America's Next Top Model house.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard becomes convinced he has met his soulmate in the form of surgeon Stephanie Barnett, but he fails to realise she is far more interested in Leonard. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj argue about what to watch on TV. Sara Rue guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard meets up with the woman he kissed during his trip in the hope of setting Penny's mind at ease, while Sheldon films a special episode of Fun with Flags after his break-up with Amy. Bernadette feels guilty about keeping a secret from Penny.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys' science skills are put to the test when they get a flat tyre during Leonard's surprise bachelor party weekend in Mexico. Meanwhile, the girls finally force Penny to break the news to her family that she has eloped with Leonard. Keith Carradine guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Leonard announce that they are moving in together, prompting Sheldon to revisit 2003, a much simpler time before he had met either of them. Howard and Raj form a band to play at the comic-book store, only to fall out over musical differences.(n)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol (2011)
programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt and his team are implicated in a bombing at the Kremlin, forcing the American president to declare them fugitives. The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox USA
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces in the US critique the week's TV, including Sharon and Kelly Osbourne, Tyra Banks and Meghan Trainor.(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton heads to Australia to investigate eucalyptus, which is found in throat lozenges and chewing gum, with a local farmer shows her the clever way the highly toxic plant is made safe for human consumption. Jimmy Doherty is in Poland to find out about sauerkraut, before learning about a remarkable new use for its juice in a French power station, while Matt Tebbutt examines whether coffee, tomatoes, potatoes or even red wine should be kept in the fridge.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Pia and Stephen Abbott have been married for 35 years and have long dreamt of owning a property in Spain. Jasmine Harman helps the couple find a home around La Marina Alta within their £130,000 budget.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more gems hidden among unwanted possessions, trying to make a profit from church organ pipes and old leather sports car seats.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole calls in a locksmith to bring a safe back from the scrapheap, and a ship's wheel is left in splinters when the presenter falls out with restorer Guy.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul start transforming their abandoned scullery into a kitchen. Meanwhile, Adam goes for a second viewing at a property on the slopes of the Pyrenees.(n)

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: A couple in Shrewsbury comes up with a modern take on a Victorian terrace, but a growing family and a series of delays caused by planning regulations threaten their plans.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former pop singer Danny Karne welcomes guests to the Pavilion, his fashion and rock 'n' roll-themed hotel in central London, and the sports car parked outside wows his visitors. But the petrol-head's decision to take his fellow hoteliers to a motoring museum goes down badly when one of them reveals he has no passion for cars.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: John Luce and his partner Pat Sutton invite their fellow hoteliers to the Fox and Duck, a country inn in Therfield, Hertfordshire. The local golf club provides the guests with adequate entertainment, and they appear to bond as they share friendly banter and a spot of singing at the end of the night. However, the following morning brings with it a shower disaster.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dave and Debbie Lang, who run the New Inn in Newbridge-on-Wye, Powys, play host. Dave is a keen pig breeder and owns the on-site butcher's shop as well as running a pub, so he serves some of his award-winning pork products for breakfast.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Kerstin and Robert Sharpe, the owners of Westleigh Farm in Somerset, play host, and despite the initial cobwebs found by some of the guests, they are soon won over by the size of the showers, the quality of the milk and the generous helpings for breakfast.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Middlesex and Surrey, where projects include repurposing a 1950s hairdryer, updating a school desk and the restoration of a child's motorbike.(n)

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley host as contestants pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers. Dr Linda Papadopoulos is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge takes children Arthur and Dorothy on a mission to rescue baby toads in their chateau grounds. Donna and Paul put the rest of their renovations on hold as they set themselves the challenge of turning a wing of the chateau into a self-contained apartment for Donna's parents, Anne and Brian.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Robert and Milla Gaukroger who, when he last saw them, were in danger of their bank foreclosing on their unfinished timber house with views of Lake Windermere. They had begun construction with only a quarter of the £400,000 budget needed, and the physical effort of turning the 1980s property into an eco-home that mirrored the surrounding mountains had begun to put Robert's health at risk.(n)

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's trip to enlist settlers for Fraser's Ridge reveals the depth of anti-British sentiment, while Claire struggles to keep the peace between their neighbours and the Cherokee.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley host as contestants pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers. Dr Linda Papadopoulos is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

Meanwhile, doctors investigate the damage to the chest and lungs of 40-year-old Karen, who fell off her horse, which then trampled on her, while leukaemia patient Hayley, 29, comes to St George's with wife Emma after suffering an infection and low immune system.(n)

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Mrs Doyle wins a competition to meet a famous singer, and discreetly invites him round for tea - but the secret slips out, and soon the house is besieged by hordes of adoring pensioners. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Pauline McLynn.(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton learns some important differences between gelato and ice-cream at a parlour in Rome, while Jimmy Doherty visits Mauritius to find out about white and dark rum and learns where the term 'proof' originally came from in relation to alcohol. Matt Tebbutt visits a traditional sweet factory in Blackburn to examine why his mouth goes cold when he sucks on a mint.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Elsa and Brian Surridge were on the verge of buying a Spanish property when the 2008 financial crisis scared them off. A decade later they're back and Brian has promised Elsa they won't leave without bagging their dream retirement property on the Costa Blanca. Jasmine Harman shows them five very different options for their cash budget of £75,000.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo travel the length of Britain seeking items to fix up, flog on and sell for profit. Max upcycles a brass propeller into a stylish table lamp, while Henry goes all Victorian with an old pond yacht.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel Britain looking for items to fix up and flog on behalf of their owners. In this episode they're close to the Malvern Hills. Henry picks two saddles from horse owner Sabrina and converts them into bar stools, while Simon makes a handsome profit on a 1960s kitchen cupboard.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge takes children Arthur and Dorothy on a mission to rescue baby toads in their chateau grounds. Donna and Paul put the rest of their renovations on hold as they set themselves the challenge of turning a wing of the chateau into a self-contained apartment for Donna's parents, Anne and Brian.(n)

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to the fringes of the New Forest, where serial renovators Glyn and Sue step up to the big league by building an oak-framed home fit for their retirement. Glyn's desperate to get hands-on, but this project won't roll over easily, throwing the determined couple enough problems to test even the hardiest of self-builders.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of Guest and the City, Dan and Mardi Leonard, welcome their visitors in Brighton, but there is a mixed reaction to the couple's contemporary decor and stained glass windows. The unconventional furniture leaves some guests confused, and one pair of fellow hoteliers bemoan the lack of sausages at breakfast.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Phil Kiernan invites the contestants to the Farmer's Boy Inn in Longhope, Gloucestershire, where he challenges them to a pie-making competition. However, the task proves less entertaining than the bickering that occurs between two guests as they try to share a kitchen.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan and Jane Asher host on the Geanna, their purpose-built hotel boat. Dan and Mardi Leonard are concerned space is too tight, while Sarah Langford and Jean-Pierre Kujawa worry about their privacy being invaded. A trip up the Thames allows the guests to sip champagne and get to know the ropes, but the mood at dinner is subdued, and when the owners cook their first breakfast on board they find themselves bickering.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sarah Langford and Jean-Pierre Kujawa, who have run the Sentry Mead B&B on the Isle of Wight for six years, play host in the last challenge of the week. The guests arrive with high expectations and after a few setbacks, the dinner and breakfast win everyone over.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel the length of Britain turning unwanted junk into profit for their owners. In this episode they're on the south coast, where Henry gets to work an aircraft fuel tank while Simon gets obsessed with an iconic '60s speedboat.(n)

programme.title: Countdown

In south-west France, Donna and Paul are hard at work on their most ambitious project yet, creating a tea room. However, stringent building regulations add to the challenge. Elsewhere, Ithaca and Alex need to raise some cash to help repair their chateau's 300-year-old roof.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs

It was intended to be energy self-sufficient and able to supply surplus power to the National Grid, but serious problems occurred when the arch collapsed during construction, so the presenter returns to see if their innovative home has lived up to its promise.(n)

programme.title: Thou Shalt Not Kill
programme.desc: The principal dancer at a prestigious dance company becomes ill during rehearsal and dies from poisoning, while the prima ballerina of the company is also seriously sick and is sent to emergency. The apparent murder brings old rivalries to the surface which muddies an already murky case. Elsewhere, Andrea and Giorgio decide to join forces to get to the bottom of the Ferro case. Crime drama, with Miriam Leone. In Italian.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An 80-year-old patient is admitted suffering from pain in her chest, arm and jaw, and consultant Sarah is concerned that Joan's heart is struggling and requests an urgent blood test and heart. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

Meanwhile, 27-year-old Sam awaits X-ray results after he fainted and cut his lip while smoking a Cuban cigar at a barbecue.(n)

programme.title: Countdown

They've got their hearts set on a holiday home on Spain's Costa Cálida where they can boogie their way to retirement. Jonnie Irwin shows the couple five properties for their budget of £45,000.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: After becoming foster parents to three young children, Jo Danson and her husband Bill decided a holiday home would be the perfect way for everyone to spend quality time together. programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun

Jasmine Harman shows them a range of properties within their £300,000 budget, from a coastal renovation project to an inland cortijo. However, it remains to be seen whether she can deliver the perfect property in the perfect location.(n)

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals

Judges Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden are on hand to assess the results of their efforts and decide which team will be leaving the contest this week.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

However, a disaster with his dessert gets the day off to a bad start, and his main course, which he has chosen to call Bambi on a Plate, leaves one guest in tears - while another flatly refuses to eat it.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mature student Richard Howse hosts the third dinner party in Reading, using a menu and set of instructions provided by his girlfriend to guide him. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Princess Diana's 'Wicked' Stepmother
programme.desc: An examination of the turbulent relationship between Diana, Princess of Wales and her formidable stepmother Raine Spencer, who rose from humble origins with the help of her larger-than-life mother, the novelist Barbara Cartland, to become a countess and a member of the royal family. Raine was a divisive figure, who was doted on by her husband Johnnie Spencer but loathed by Diana and her siblings. Yet as the princess's marriage collapsed, she reached out to her stepmother for support, marking a change in the women's relationship.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman guest star in the sitcom, with Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix.(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee's dad Frank moves in after an argument with his latest fancy woman, but it soon becomes clear he's drinking too much, so the flatmates stage an intervention. If he agrees to seek help, he can stay - if he keeps boozing, they'll kick him out. Bobby Ball guest stars, with Lee Mack and Sally Bretton.(n)

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Compilation looking back at highlights of past episodes of the comedy quiz hosted by Dara O Briain, with regular panellists Hugh Dennis, Andy Parsons and Chris Addison. From 2012.(n)

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu is back on home turf - cooking for comedian Phil Wang, who is performing his Philly Philly Wang Wang show in London's West End.(n)

programme.title: Mock the Week

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britain's most historic landscapes. The moors and valleys of West Yorkshire were the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontes, the literary family who produced such classics as Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre. Over four days, Tony heads out from the Victorian wool capital of Bradford and treks in a giant loop around what is now known as Bronte Country. From the birth of Charlotte, Emily, Anne and their brother Branwell in the suburb of Thornton, he traces their childhoods to the much-romanticised Bronte hub of Haworth, finding that the harsh reality of life in the 1820s was far removed from the fantasy world dreamed up by the children at their father's parsonage home.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring ship graveyards, including Scapa Flow in Orkney, where German warships were scuttled after the First World War, and Mallows Bay, home to 200 wrecks colonised by wildlife.(n)

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.sub-title: The Brides In The Bath Killer
programme.desc: The case of George Smith, who married a succession of women and murdered them so he could inherit their wealth.(n)

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles, a liquid oxygen factory and two launch pads.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second of two programmes from Walmer Castle in Kent, where the team values a jacket worn by President Kennedy that could be one of the most valuable items ever featured on the series. Other items brought in include an art deco mask that terrifies its owner's children, an enamel advertising sign, and a letter from Lord Nelson that has an unexpected connection to the owner's dead husband.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The team struggles to explain how a DAF 33 gearbox works, and office manager Sarah attempts to bring order to the auto memorabilia sale.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A ghostly house in a tropical paradise that is still feared by the locals and a pioneering complex marked by both glory and tragedy that will soon to be lost forever.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second visit in this series to Plas Newydd on the Isle of Anglesey. The team examine rarities including a cabinet with a secret function, a magazine rack made by celebrated designer Piero Fornasetti, a collection of historical items related to deafness, a Chinese silver punchbowl and a photo that has a connection to the Apollo 11 mission.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The nature series looks at animals that live on some of the world's highest mountains. Cameras show gelada baboons screaming to frighten off predators in Ethiopia, demoiselle cranes struggling to migrate over the Himalayas, snow leopards hunting on the peaks of Pakistan and a wild giant panda nursing a baby in a hillside cave. Presented by David Attenborough.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough focuses on animals living in deserts. In the rocky Namibian desert, elephants desperately search for food and lions wander the wilderness hunting oryx.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.sub-title: Walking Through History: Norman Conquest of Pembrokeshire
programme.desc: Tony Robinson heads to the south-west corner of Wales and one of Britain's finest coastal paths to find out why Pembrokeshire feels so English, even though it's more than 100 miles from the border. With its numerous castles and a fine cathedral, there are sure signs the Normans stamped their mark over the area. Tony's four-day walk traces the story of their conquest of the county, which he discovers was very different from the knockout victory at Hastings, involving a long, fiercely fought struggle.(n)

programme.title: History's Greatest Hoaxes
programme.desc: The stories of famous hoaxes, featuring personal accounts of those who perpetrated and exposed them, beginning with the infamous alien autopsy footage.(n)

programme.title: Duran Duran: There's Something You Should Know
programme.desc: Simon Le Bon, John Taylor, Nick Rhodes and Roger Taylor open up about the highs and lows of the band's career - with archive footage of former guitarist Andy Taylor helping round out the story. The documentary charts their trajectory through seven of their 14 albums, each one uncovering a compelling chapter in the history of five lads from Birmingham who had one simple dream - to become the biggest band in the world. Contributors include Boy George, Nile Rodgers and Mark Ronson.(n)

programme.title: Fleetwood Mac - Don't Stop
programme.desc: Documentary looking back over the band's long career, from the early blues outfit led by Peter Green in the late 1960s, to their reincarnation in the 1970s with the line-up that went on to record the 40-million-selling album Rumours. Mick Fleetwood, John McVie, Lindsey Buckingham and Stevie Nicks reveal the truth behind the successes, failures and relationships that characterised their music and made them one of the most enduring acts in popular music.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek, with help from the Mathewson clan, drag a mini pickup out of the barn where it's been for 20 years, and a 350cc Douglas Mark V motorbike from 1950 goes under the hammer.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Four VW camper vans pitch up at the auction house looking for a new home and Derek picks up an Austin 16 that 'goes like stink and has some unusual modern modifications'.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a car auction business. A near-perfect 50s Chevy panel van and a very desirable low-mileage 80s Brooklands Capri tempt auctioneer Derek out of Yorkshire.(n)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores nature's evolutionary anomalies and examines two creatures whose stretched features have given them an edge in the natural world. The chameleon has an extra-long tongue that helps it catch prey and the giraffe's neck is so long it is easily able to reach the tops of trees for food.(n)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough highlights the curiosities that have led to accusations of forgery, but have ultimately helped assist the rethinking of evolution. When early explorers brought the first specimen of a duck-billed platypus to England in 1799, it was considered so bizarre it was deemed a hoax. Similarly, the midwife toad became the centre of a scientific storm in the 1920s that led to accusations of fakery.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of wildlife that inhabit remote islands, revealing the advantages and disadvantages of the creatures' habitat. Three-toed sloths in the Caribbean and nesting albatross enjoy a peaceful existence untroubled by predators, but other animals are not so fortunate. Marine iguanas in the Galapagos Islands are preyed on by racer snakes from birth, while penguins on the Antarctic island of Zavodovski risk being battered against the rocks by fierce waves.(n)

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: The first of three programmes about the wildlife, landscape and culture in different areas of the country explores the Sierra Madre mountains, and reveals how this rugged landscape has shaped the nation. This chain of peaks includes several volcanoes and is home to a wide variety of animals, including black bears, monarch butterflies, orchid bees and quetzals. The programme also visits the ruins of an ancient Aztec shrine and the blue agave plant which grows in the mountains is used in making tequila.(n)

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: Exploring the forests of the Yucatan Peninsula, which contain the ruins of the Mayan civilisation and a wide range of wildlife, including jaguars, monkeys and tropical birds. The region also holds a secret that is the key to how Mexico's people and animals are able to survive during the country's dry season.(n)

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: The series concludes by exploring the north of the country, which is dominated by two deserts - the Sonoran and the Chihuahuan. The programme explores the conditions that have shaped this environment, and reveals how animals including prairie dogs, pygmy owls and aplomado falcons have adapted to thrive in these arid conditions.(n)

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of marine life in different environments around the north, beginning with a tropical coral reef which has medicinal properties for dolphins, and is used as a tool by tusk fish. In Japan, a shipwreck is home to the Asian sheepshead wrasse, which can change gender, while in the polar north, walruses struggle to find ice floes for their pups to rest on as climate change takes its toll on the environment.(n)

Also competing are Mia and Adam, whose attachment parenting ethos means they prioritise the needs and desires of their daughter and son over their own. The design for Toby's five-building home contains six bedrooms, six bathrooms, a music studio and an annexe - a vast project more like a village than a house. Creating this life changing vision on a £530k budget, and in only eight months, will not be an easy task, especially as they must build up close to an ancient oak without destroying any of the roots.(n)

programme.title: True Stories
programme.sub-title: America's Animal Hoarder: Horror at the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of Terry Thompson, who released his collection of exotic animals onto the streets of Zanesville, Ohio, before killing himself in October 2011. The authorities were forced to shoot 48 of the dangerous creatures, including tigers, lions and bears, to bring the situation under control. Only six animals survived, and were taken to a local zoo. This film, first shown as part of the True Stories strand, explores the events in Thompson's past that led up to the incident, and includes interviews with the police officers involved.(n)

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Marine biologist Alison is busy preparing for the release of Nick, a critically endangered African penguin, on the Western Cape. Vet Emily has to anaesthetise a cheetah that needs to go to a new home.(n)

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Anna and the team from the Rhino Revolution dehorn two rare and very dangerous black rhinos, while Emma prepares Finya the black-backed jackal for release. Jenna and Sean, the leading forces in elephant research, tackle the growing problem of human and elephant conflict.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsey heads to New Jersey's Spanish Pavilion, which is run by two warring brothers whose staff spend more time using their mobile phones than working. The chef plans to turn the eatery's fortunes around, and starts by giving the dining room and menu a modern makeover.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for West Babylon, New York, to help the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts. The chef struggles to cope with disorganised staff and an unappealing menu, but quickly realises the real problem lies in the kitchen, where a lack of leadership and communication is causing serious trouble.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eatery's co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: From entertainment juggernauts to the week's biggest news stories and from hard-hitting documentary series to gritty drama, a cast of well-known faces offers sharp, insightful, funny and sometimes emotional critiques of popular and topical TV shows, sparking debate and giving viewers the chance to share those 'we said that' moments. This episode features Denise Van Outen and her partner Eddie, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Joe Swash and Stacey Solomon, Zoe Ball and her son Woody Cook, Nicola Adams and her partner Ella, and Harry Redknapp and his wife Sandra.(n)

programme.title: True Stories
programme.sub-title: America's Animal Hoarder: Horror at the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of Terry Thompson, who released his collection of exotic animals onto the streets of Zanesville, Ohio, before killing himself in October 2011. The authorities were forced to shoot 48 of the dangerous creatures, including tigers, lions and bears, to bring the situation under control. Only six animals survived, and were taken to a local zoo. This film, first shown as part of the True Stories strand, explores the events in Thompson's past that led up to the incident, and includes interviews with the police officers involved.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents chase almost £3,000 owed by Indian takeaway owners, but when the staff deny any knowledge of the debt, the agents threaten to seize kitchen equipment. programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of individuals on the dole in the UK follows the stories of Roma people who moved to the UK and are now surviving on payments from the welfare state. Ion is from Romania and wants to make £40,000 from benefits to help him build a new house for his family back in his home village, while Katarina arrived from Slovakia seven years ago and has 11 children and 11 grandchildren living in and around an estate in Rotherham, South Yorkshire. Nottingham resident Viorel is 25 and lost both legs in an accident in his native Romania when he was seven, and now wants to pursue a career in the movies.(n)

Starring Chris Noth and Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man who served as a juror in the trial of a mobster is shot dead at a baseball game, leading to a battle of wills between McCoy and his long-time friend - the suspect's attorney. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate a fire at a rock concert that left 23 people dead, and discover that the band's pyrotechnics may have caused the blaze. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A taxi-driver is found dead in his car, and Logan follows a chain of evidence involving a loan shark, a forged cheque and a missing plumber that leads him to believe the victim's wife is the killer. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe investigate the murder of a psychiatrist, and their inquiries lead them to suspect the killer is either the victim's former husband, her obstructive father or a patient with multiple personality disorder.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The unit is tipped off about terrorist activity, and two agents are murdered during the ensuing investigation. Believing the information to be a set-up, the team tries to solve the case with assistance from a guilt-stricken Paula Cassidy, who holds herself responsible for the tragedy. Drama, starring Jessica Steen.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee feels the pressure as the team investigates a double murder that appears to be inspired by his still unpublished new novel. His sense of guilt is compounded by the realisation that one of his colleagues could become the killer's third target. American drama following the work of the Naval Criminal Investigative Service, starring Sean Murray and Mark Harmon.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A blind man unwittingly photographs evidence of a murder, leading Jethro and the team to the corpse of a petty officer who was stabbed with a knife left at the scene. Further evidence indicates his death was not the result of a random mugging - but cracking the case proves difficult. Meanwhile, Tony has relationship problems. Drama, starring Mark Harmon.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is made acting director while Jenny is attending an overseas conference. However, he decides to ignore his duties and investigate the murder of a man who arrived dead in a taxi at the team's headquarters with no clues to his identity - except a mysterious list of names. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team members get tangled in an elaborate online hoax that leads to the rape of a popular social media star. Meanwhile, Benson sets new ground rules with Sheila. Mariska Hargitay and Brooke Shields star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A sports reporter seeks Benson's help to accuse a cameraman of rape, but only agrees to press charges after she discovers the man is stalking her. Before the trial begins the team finds out she is pregnant, and ADA Barba must contend with questionable defence tactics as a result.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU detectives investigate after a school nurse notices multiple injuries on a young girl. It soon becomes clear that they must stop a clinically psychopathic boy with homicidal tendencies. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A girl disappears after following her older sister to a college party in Manhattan. The SVU detectives pull together to find her, but are thwarted by a hi-tech kidnapper using the internet to cover his tracks. As the case stalls, DA Barba (guest star Raul Esparza) returns with some unlikely help. Meanwhile, Rollins is distracted when her troubled sister suddenly turns up.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A baby's abduction from a playground leads to a twisted case of lies, betrayal and infidelity. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Longmire
programme.desc: Two treasure-hunters find the near-mummified body of known philanderer Tony Kaufman stuffed in a hollow tree. The missing husband was killed by several stab wounds to the chest, and Walt and Vic begin to suspect his bitter mother-in-law, who despised him for his cheating ways and for being a deadbeat. Meanwhile, Cady gets her first case for her legal clinic as she helps an abused woman on the reservation. Robert Taylor and Katee Sackhoff star.(n)

programme.title: Longmire
programme.desc: Despite killing JP in self-defence to protect herself and JP's abused wife Asha, Cady is disturbed by guilt and considers ending her work on the reservation. Henry reassures her that, since she defended a member of the tribe, the Cheyenne are on her side. Meanwhile, Jacob Nighthorse asks Walt to look into an alleged threat from the Irish mob. Mounting evidence points to a secret deal between the mob and Malachi Strand and Walt finds it difficult to trust Jacob prior to an attempt is made on both their lives. Robert Taylor stars.(n)

programme.desc: An abortion clinic doctor is murdered, and when Logan and Briscoe investigate, they begin to suspect members of a radical movement led by a former priest, who appears to have no sympathy for the man's fate. Starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called to investigate the death of an executive shot in his apartment, and discover the victim had lost his job nine months previously - leaving them mystified as to where a sizeable bank deposit he had been living off could have come from. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gay city councillor is shot dead after a meeting, and the trail of suspicion leads the team to a bigoted rival politician and a male prostitute. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and his new partner Ray Curtis investigate the murder of a girl who disappeared after school, and the trail of clues begins with blurry footage of her capture recorded by an ATM machine's camera. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt.(n)

programme.desc: Director Jenny Shepard tries to solve the murder of an underworld source who was prepared to give information on the activities of arms dealer La Grenouille. Starring Lauren Holly and Mark Harmon.(n)

programme.title: NCIS

Naval crime drama, starring Cote de Pablo and Michael Weatherly.(n)

programme.title: Ransom
programme.desc: When a baby is abducted from his cot by a notorious serial kidnapper, the team must find out why the child was targeted and locate him before he is taken out of the country.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A local college student is sexually assaulted, and the SVU detectives utilise every strategy they have to uncover a massive conspiracy involving the university's leading administrators. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a high-school teen is gang-raped at a rock concert, Amaro finds himself trying to save the reputation of the prime suspect, an army veteran with Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder and a fragmented memory of exactly what happened on the night concerned. Meanwhile, Vic takes the stand against Chance Gilbert in the kidnapping case, and Chance's wife threatens her with retribution for testifying.(n)

programme.sub-title: The Stuff Dreams Are Made Of

Mayor Sawyer Crane calls Jacob Nighthorse to his office and offers him a deal - in return for some of the businessman's money and influence to help him in re-election, Crane pledges to take down Longmire. Meanwhile, Chance Gilbert is convicted. Robert Taylor stars.(n)

programme.title: Filthy Cities
programme.desc: Dan Snow experiences what New York was like at the height of the Industrial Revolution. Millions fled to escape the persecution, poverty and famine of 19th-century Europe, only to be confronted by living conditions worse than those they had left behind. He explores the overcrowded slums of Lower Manhattan, which were a breeding ground for cholera and typhoid, and has a go at cooking using clothes dye and floor cleaner - ingredients that were added to meals to disguise the smell of spoiled meat. He also discovers how certain feats of engineering transformed not only the city, but the world.(n)

programme.title: Bruce's Price Is Right
programme.desc: Bruce Forsyth invites audience members to come on down and compete for prizes including cars, caravans and all-expenses-paid holidays in the sun.(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings.(n)

Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Boyzone's Shane Lynch, former athlete Colin Jackson, Emmerdale actress Fiona Wade (Priya Sharma) and comedian Stephen K Amos compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts.
